task_language: Pick the cream cheese and place it in the basket
frame: object (eef home z=0.261, table top z=0.002)
strategy_notes: OBJECT-frame scene with 6 small food items + basket on the right. Localization by back-projection from agentview world_00.npy: scanned all pixels with z>0.015 to enumerate candidate object blobs, then sampled RGB at each center to classify. Initial mis-ID: the small ORANGE box at (row=119,col=111), world (-0.183,-0.073,0.020), looked like Philadelphia cream cheese but the wrist-cam image_wrist_03 revealed it was actually labelled 'FARM FRESH BUTTER' (so this orange box = butter_1, not cream_cheese_1). Released butter back and re-scanned for a blue/dark-colored box. Found cream cheese at agentview pixel (~122,143) world (-0.155,+0.057,0.021). Wrist-cam fine-localization at step 06 (world_wrist_06) refined to world (-0.141,+0.062,0.017) — confirmed visually as the blue 'Cream C...' labelled box in image_wrist_06. Pi0_pick at refined xy succeeded (peak_lift 0.100m, gripper_opening 0.043m -> holding). Basket rim localized from agentview world_10 with z-band [0.12,0.15] mask in ROI (rows 110-160, cols 175-240): basket interior bbox x∈[-0.054,+0.094], y∈[+0.163,+0.334], rim z≈0.134. First release at (0.08,0.22,0.22) landed on the basket front rim; cream cheese rolled out to the table at (0.13,0.22,0.04). Re-localized fallen box, re-picked, then carried to basket-interior CENTER (0.02,0.25,0.23) — well within the rim bbox — and released. libero_terminated=true on step 17.
